ham.subject: Autumn Semester 2026 Registration Deadline – Final Reminder
ham.body:
Dear Students,

This is a final reminder that the registration deadline for the Autumn semester 2026 is approaching on Friday, June 1st. Please ensure that you have completed all prerequisite courses and paid the associated tuition fees before the deadline.

Key details:
- Registration portal: <URL>
- Fee payment deadline: Friday, June 1st 11:59 PM
- Office hours for enrollment assistance: Monday to Thursday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM

If you encounter any technical issues or need guidance on course selection, contact the Registrar’s Office at registrar@university.edu or call 555‑123‑4567.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Sincerely,

Registrar Office
University of Example

spam.subject: Urgent: Claim Your $8,000 Scholarship Award Now!
spam.body:
Dear [FIRSTNAME],

Congratulations! You have been selected as a recipient of the National Excellence Scholarship for 2026. To secure your award, you must submit your banking details to process the disbursement.

The scholarship committee requires the following information:
- Full legal name
- Bank account number
- Routing number
- Photo ID

Please complete the submission before midnight on **June 2nd**. Failure to provide the required details will result in forfeiture of the award.

Confirm your award here: <URL>

For any questions, email the Scholarship Office at scholarship@government.gov or call 555‑987‑6543.

Act now and claim your reward!

Best regards,

National Scholarship Committee
